name: Mushroom Quesadillas
method: Heat the oil in a skillet over the medium heat the oil.
Put mushrooms in the pan. Cook for 5 minutes.
Put scallions and garlic to the pan. Cook for 2-4 minutes, then add
Place one tortilla in a pan and add 2 tablespoons mushrooms and
cheese. Add 2 tablespoons more cheese and cilantro leaves.
Put one more tortilla on the top and seal it lightly.
Cook both sides and repeat this with all tortillas, filling, and cheese.
Serve hot with salsa and jalapeño peppers.
